comment: SEI; disable interrupts; start of reset handler
PPU ctrl: NMI off / 8x8 sprites / BG pattern table 1
VS. System register - coin/service I/O
Wait for 1st VBlank
Wait for 2nd VBlank
Set stack pointer to $7F (128-byte stack at $0100-$017F)
PPU ctrl: NMI enable / BG pattern 1 / sprite pattern 0
Main game loop (infinite)
Save A X Y P on stack
Force rendering on during NMI
Write OAM base address $02xx
Trigger OAM DMA from page $02
Increment frame counter low byte (ZP $0B)
Increment frame counter high byte (ZP $0A)
DirToStateTable [18 bytes]: idx=dy_sign01*3+dx_sign01; [0..8]=prefer-Y states; [9..17]=prefer-X states (applied +9 for enemy RNG or player fire)
CalcDirToTarget: sign(TargetX-EntityX)+1->$64; sign(TargetY-EntityY)+1->$65; idx=$65*3+$64 (0..8)
idx formula: A=$65*3+$64; enemy uses RNG to pick +9(X-prefer); player uses fire-btn bit
Enemy: 50% chance use X-preferred table (idx+9); else Y-preferred
BulletExplode helper: encodes dir into tile offset; adjusts X by -5; calls DrawEntityTile
StageLoader: loads level-init ptr ($8000[stage]) via JmpThruPtr0 when $30!=0; else uses $801A outer table + SubStageIdx ($42)
StageLoader sub-stage dispatch: outer ptr=$801A[stage*2]; Y=SubStageIdx-1; inner table ptr[Y*2] called via JmpThruPtr0; first call (Y<0) goes to one-time init at $871C
StageLoader first-time init: JSR $98E0/$98BE; zero ZP $68-$EF; ORA stage flags from $80B6; call $97B1 (palette/init)
EnemyTypeTable[40]: Y=(GameSpeed-1)*4+slot; maps 4 enemy type slots to EntityType bytes; $80=Basic/$A0=Fast/$C0=Power/$E0=Armor; order shuffled per difficulty
Stage0 wave init: clear $0610-$062F (32B); clear ZP $5C-$67 (12B); STA $44=$5F=1; STA $FD=$80; enable 4 APU channels ($4015=$0F)
Stage0 phase1: STA $43=$2E (set EnemyCount=46 sub-field)
Stage0 phase2: EnemyCount=$08; $D4=$2B/$D3=$A0; $68=1; X=$12=$66=2; configure entity 2 slot data
Stage0 phase3: $44=$40=$01; $42=$00 (reset SubStageIdx); init complete
EntitySlotFill3: $34=$30
column4: $FF=1; loop X=4..0 over entity slots; loads sprite ptr from $82FA/$8300/$82F4 and OAM base from $830C; calls $8DC4+$988C at X=4 and X=2; updates $D2/$D3/$0612/$43/$25; JMP $8B98

comment: EntitySlotFill4: clamp $6D index; select ptr pair ($8348/$834E if $5E=0 else $8354/$835A); copy 6-byte slot template to $0304-$0309 (fill zeros with $FE); copy $8312[0..3] to $0300-$0303; clear $030A; JMP $8B98
EntitySpriteSetup: LDA $82F4
column5: X->$04 (OAM offset); A=0; JMP $9811 (sprite tile draw)

comment: SlotSprPtrLo[6]: {$74
column8: $D0} sprite data ptr lo bytes per entity slot (ZP $00)

comment: SlotSprOffset[6]: {$4C
column8: $78} sprite source offset per slot; used as ZP $01 and $D3

comment: SlotSprPtrHi[6]: {$90
column8: $A2} ptr high bytes per slot; combined with $82FA -> bank-0 sprite addresses

comment: SlotEntityType[6]: {$02
column8: $00} entity type params per slot; $02=enemy type 2

comment: SlotOAMBase[6]: {$04
column8: $7C} OAM slot base offsets per entity (spaced $18=24 apart)

comment: WaveCtrlInit[4]: {$09
column6: $06} 4 wave control values copied to $0300-$0303 at stage init

comment: SlotDataPtrALo[6]: {$60
column8: $7E} low bytes of EntitySlotData block ptrs (set A

comment: SlotDataPtrAHi[6]: {all $83} high bytes for set A ptrs -> $8360
SlotDataPtrBLo[6]: {$84
column8: $7E} low bytes of EntitySlotData block ptrs (set B)

comment: SlotDataPtrBHi[6]: {all $83} high bytes for set B ptrs -> $8384
SlotDataBlocksA: 6x6-byte entity slot templates (set A
SlotDataBlocksB: 6x6-byte entity slot templates (set B
StageNumLUT[6]: {$00
column8: $01} indexed by Y (game state 0..5) -> stage number -> $41 (StageNum)

comment: StageTransitionHelper: JSR $D715; copy $03F0[0..5]->$0620[0..5]; INC $41; clear $40
EntityAnimLoop: X=2->1; DEC $80
EntitySpriteLayout: OAM layout for entity X; reads $A82A
column5: Y (attr); calls $9811; Y=$16 special case (+$0C/$08 offsets); checks $0E visibility

comment: EntityAnimContinue: Y=$05 loop; $03C8
EagleStateUpdate: exit if $68=0 or neg; DEC $68; x=$68>>2; Y=2×||(x-5)|-5|; JMP via EagleHandlerTable (39-frame animation)
EagleHandlerTable[6]: Y=0→NullHandler($DC9E); Y=2→EagleExplosion1(tile$F1); Y=4→EagleExplosion2(tile$F5); Y=6→EagleExplosion3(tile$F9); Y=8→EagleDrawIntact; Y=10→EagleDrawDamaged
Eagle bullet hit: if $68≠0 set $68=$27 (start 39-frame destruction timer); $030B=$0307=1; STA $CC
$68=$80 = GameActive flag set at level start; same ZP used as eagle destruction countdown (1..$7F) and game-over check (0)
LivesGrantCheck: if $68=$80 (game active) and P1 score-tier $17≥2 or extra-life flag $66≥1: INC $51(P1Lives)+INC $66; same for P2 ($83/$52/$67); sets $0304=$0305=1 (trigger HUD update)
LevelScreenInit: wait VBlank
HQSpriteInit: set $00/$01=$2356(PPU nametable dst); $02/$03=$0400(RAM src); $0400=$17 $0402=$0405=$FB; copy $0409-$040F→$0401-$0407; JMP BuildPPUWriteQueue($992E)

BuildPPUWriteQueue: read byte from ($02)[Y]; lo-nibble=row_count; hi-nibble=col_count; write PPU-addr-hi/lo + tile data to $0301+ cmd buffer; advance src by $20 per column group; terminates with $00 sentinel
CalcSpeedTiers: X=3..0; compute speed tier 5..0 for each entity from $B0
FormationDataLoad: X=3..0; for each entity slot read 4 bytes from current stage source via ptr $03/$C0

VS System coin/service input handler: double-read $4016 (glitch filter); route bit to $4020 (VS protection); AND #$24 (bits 2&5=coin/service buttons); on press INC $4A (CoinHeldCounter); on release INC $4B (credits counter) + $0300=1 (coin event flag) + clear $4A
ClearKillTallies: loop X=7..0; STA $73
column4: X=#$00; zeros ZP $73-$7A (8 kill-tally bytes used for per-type enemy kill counts in score tally); called at LevelStart before DrawAllHUDKillIcons

comment: HUDTankAnimation: $0108=enemies-remaining display count (DEC every 16 frames via FrameLo&$0F); when $0108≥$0A: apply D2C6[Y]/D2CA[Y] delta to $0105/$0106 (X/Y position)
column4: Y=$0107 (dir index); call DrawHUDTanks; when $0108=0 set $0106=$F0 (hide sprite)

comment: HUDTankWiggleX[4]: signed X deltas for HUD tank arrival animation; {0
HUDTankWiggleY[4]: signed Y deltas for HUD tank arrival animation; {-1
